test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header

typecheck.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/

blockingIssues.description: run_two_agent builds implementer prompt text but discards it, then passes prompt_template=implementer_prompt into run_slop_code. Reviewer suggestions are stored in state but not injected into implementer execution.

Reviewer failures are still not enforced as fatal in run_two_agent. Non-zero reviewer subprocess exits can be tolerated because reviewer/implementer phase exit codes are not checked before continuing.
run_canary maps SystemExit from run_two_agent to a generic Pipeline CanaryError, so reviewer-specific component failures are not reported as component-specific.
parse_eval_results still does not fully consume flattened baseline metrics for erosion/verbosity/cost, which remain dependent on two_agent_metrics merging.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When mission-scoped validator commands are defined in AGENTS.md or .factory/services.yaml, prefer those over global defaults (`uv run pytest -q`, `uv run ruff check .`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix feature reviews still observed mismatch between python-worker default verification commands and this mission's scoped validator contract.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated report of python-worker validator scope mismatch from the second fix review.
